task_completion.description: Implement a resource ordering strategy in TransferService.java
task_completion.visual_evidence: The code in 'TransferService.java' shows logic to order locks before synchronizing, such as comparing account IDs (e.g., `if (fromAccount.getId() < toAccount.getId())`) to determine which account to lock first.

task_completion.description: Run DeadlockDemo and verify it completes successfully
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or IDE run console shows the execution of the DeadlockDemo class, ending with the exact output 'SIMULATION COMPLETED' and returning to the command prompt or showing the process has terminated.

integrity.description: Verify the simulation was actually executed
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'SIMULATION COMPLETED' output appears in a genuine terminal or IDE run console executing Java, not just typed into a text file or echoed directly.

integrity.description: Verify TransferService.java contains actual code changes
integrity.visual_evidence: The modifications in TransferService.java are valid Java code implementing resource ordering, not just comments or pseudo-code.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't bypass the Java execution
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal shows a proper Java execution command (e.g., `java com.financial.simulation.DeadlockDemo`, `mvn exec:java`, or an IDE run action) rather than a script that simply prints the expected output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/FinancialSystem. The target source file to fix is src/main/java/com/financial/core/TransferService.java.
